title: NodeDiscovery
description: Discovery document published at /.well-known/cq-node.json by a cq node. Declares where the API lives and what protocol version it speaks. Absence of this document means the client should fall back to defaults: api_base_url={addr}/api/v1, api_version=v1.

api_base_url.description: Complete URL the client uses for API requests, verbatim. The client appends only the resource path (e.g. /knowledge, /oauth/start). Any version prefix or path mounting lives inside this URL.

api_version.description: Protocol version spoken at api_base_url. Used by clients for compatibility checks, not URL construction.

node_name.description: Human-readable display name for this node. Optional.
